title: Former Steinhoff CEO Markus Jooste dies
description: NATIONAL NEWS - The former Steinhoff CEO,...
bodyText:
NATIONAL NEWS - The former Steinhoff CEO, Markus Jooste, died yesterday, 21 March, after allegedly shooting himself.

Read the full article here on the Caxton publication, The Citizen

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
